Class NearbyEntity.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<NearbyEntity.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<NearbyEntity.Builder>
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.NearbyEntity.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.google.protobuf.Message.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLite.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder, NearbyEntityOrBuilder, Cloneable
Enclosing class:
NearbyEntity
public static final class NearbyEntity.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<NearbyEntity.Builder> implements NearbyEntityOrBuilder
A brief summary of an entity in the bot's world view. Intended for use as
a repeated item in list responses and streaming events.
Protobuf type soulfire.v1.NearbyEntity

    • getEntityId

      public int getEntityId()
      The numeric network entity id assigned by the server.
Use this to target the entity in AttackEntity / InteractEntity.
      int32 entity_id = 1 [(.google.api.field_behavior) = REQUIRED];
      Specified by:
      getEntityId in interface NearbyEntityOrBuilder
      Returns:
      The entityId.

    • hasHealth

      public boolean hasHealth()
      Current health, if known. Not populated for entities without a health
attribute or when the bot cannot observe it.
      optional float health = 7;
      Specified by:
